matches.title: Development of New Accelerated Aging Test for Comparison of the Quality of Different Insulating Papers Based on Cellulose
matches.abstract:
The aim of this study is to propose a test method for the determination of the quality of

transformer paper insulation. For this purpose, the oil/cellulose insulation systems were exposed to

various accelerated aging tests. The results of the aging experiments of normal Kraft and thermally

upgraded papers, two different types of transformer oil (mineral and natural ester), and
